name: Mira Cade
description: Late twenties, sharp features, quick smile that doesn't always reach her eyes. Dark hair cropped short, silver earring (left ear). Dresses well enough to pass in polite company. Always smells like cigarette smoke and jasmine.

society.name: The Ashwick Charter
society.charter: Investigate the disappearance of Fen Harker, Gradient Scholar researcher. Recover him alive. Report all findings.

factionRelation: Newly contracted. Mira has worked both sides of Ashwick her whole life -- having official backing is new.
inventory:
Arc pistol ammunition (12 charges)
Derringer ammunition (10 rounds)
Lockpicks (professional set)
Forged Greycoat credentials (passable)
Cigarette case (silver, monogrammed M.C.)
Small mirror (pocket-sized)
Fine pen and notepad
Change of clothes (working class, for disguise)
Society stipend purse (50 marks)
notes:
Grew up on Harrier Street, right on the gradient border.
Won the arc pistol in a card game. Hasn't asked where it came from.
Can fake three different accents convincingly.
Always carries two sets of ID -- real and forged.
Knows the Lamplighter Syndicate exists. Has bought drinks for some of their people. Not a member, not an enemy. Yet.
